title: Arithmetic expression fails to return result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_arithmetic (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC(10, 2) NOT NULL);
SELECT value, ((value - 1.65) * (value - 1.65)) AS result FROM test_arithmetic WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, ((CAST(value AS NUMERIC(10, 2)) - 1.65) * (CAST(value AS NUMERIC(10, 2)) - 1.65)) AS result FROM test_arithmetic;
SELECT value, ((value + 1.65) * (value - 1.65)) AS result FROM test_arithmetic WHERE value < 2.5;
key_bug_features: Arithmetic expressions with minus and multiplication yield no results
